description_for_human: Headless Model Context Protocol (MCP) server streaming primary-source, zero-hallucination structured scientific and engineering TSV knowledge matrices.
description_for_model: Use this server to query hyper-specialized, dense, structured scientific data layers, including astrophysics, advanced mathematics, formal linguistics, and biotech. Output is optimized for direct text grounding and zero-hallucination processing. Settles queries via x402 headers over Base L2 networks.
